deposit_modal.title: Pay with PIX
deposit_modal.copy_paste_hint: Or copy the PIX copy-and-paste code:
deposit_modal.auto_credit_notice: After payment, your balance will be credited automatically within 1 minute.

cpf_modal.title: Required information
cpf_modal.description: Asaas requires CPF and date of birth to generate the PIX payment and verify your age.
cpf_modal.cpf_invalid: Enter a valid CPF with 11 digits.
cpf_modal.save_data: Save this to my account (won't need to enter it again)

title: Wallet
deposit_confirmed_toast: Deposit of R$ {{value}} confirmed! Balance updated.

deposit.title: Deposit via PIX
deposit.disabled_notice: Deposits are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
deposit.generic_error: Error generating PIX. Please try again.
deposit.footer_notice: After payment, the Chess Coins value will be credited automatically. There's no fee for deposits.

withdraw.title: Withdraw via PIX
withdraw.disabled_notice: Withdrawals are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
withdraw.amount_label: Amount in CC (min. 10 CC · fee: {{pct}}%, min. {{min}} CC)
withdraw.pix_key_required_error: Register a PIX key before withdrawing.
withdraw.success_message: Withdrawal of {{amount}} CC requested! Fee: {{fee}} CC. You'll receive R$ {{net}} via PIX within 30 minutes.
withdraw.footer_notice: Withdrawals go through anti-fraud analysis and are processed within 30 minutes. 2% fee (minimum 2 CC).

cc_history.title: CC History
cc_history.subtitle: All Chess Coins movements on your account

cancel_modal.title: Cancel deposit?
cancel_modal.description: The QR Code will be invalidated and you won't be able to complete the payment anymore.
